skills.name: browse-collection
skills.description: Browse the full catalogue of historical objects in The Meridian archive. Each object has a name, era, origin country, condition, category, year, and a set of tags.

skills.name: browse-categories
skills.description: Explore objects grouped by their collecting category (e.g. maps, instruments, documents, photographs).

skills.name: read-about
skills.description: Learn about The Meridian archive, its curatorial approach, and the collector behind it.
